prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2024年理科最低位次约68名，2025年物理类最低位次约128名，从理科到物理类（新高考改革）后位次明显后移约60名，主要受考试模式变化和招生计划调整影响；2025年基准位次约128名；2024年理科计划2人，2025年物理类计划1人，2026年物理类计划仍为1人，招生规模极小且连续两年持平，计划稳定意味着供需弹性主值不变。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；复旦大学软科主榜2026年排名第5，属全国顶尖高校；复旦大学上海医学院为复旦王牌医学院，临床医学为A级学科，整体层次极高；复旦大学2025年声誉偏正面（新闻传播学A++等科研成果），2026年声誉偏负面（师德师风相关事件）；抖音综合热度排名第4（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度持续高位；临床医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A+、药学A、护理学A-，均为A-及以上等级；招生专业临床医学（八年制临床医师班）对应临床医学A级学科，学科实力全国顶尖。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学专业热度持续高热（2021-2024年），2026年临床医学仍为高热推荐专业；宁夏2026年普通高考总人数约66000人，较2025年（65897人）基本持平，物理类考生约44550人，竞争格局稳定；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海，属一线城市，对西北地区考生有较强吸引力；该校在宁夏招生计划极少（仅1人），属于典型的外省顶尖高校在宁招生，地域偏好因素影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次128名、2026年招生计划持平、考生总数基本稳定、临床医学专业热度持续高热、学校声誉偏负面但抖音高热等因素，预计2026年位次较2025年略有前移（竞争略加剧）。主要驱动因素：临床医学专业持续高热吸引更多高分考生报考，但学校2026年声誉偏负面对报考热情有一定抑制；招生计划持平不改变供需弹性主值。预测最低位次约118名，区间108-128名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2024, the minimum ranking for science was approximately 68, while in 2025, the minimum ranking for physics category was about 128. After transitioning from science to physics category (new college entrance exam reform), the ranking significantly shifted backward by about 60 places, mainly due to changes in exam format and adjustments in enrollment plan. The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 128. In 2024, the science enrollment plan was 2 students; in 2025, the physics category plan was 1 student; in 2026, the physics category plan remains 1 student. The enrollment scale is extremely small and has remained unchanged for two consecutive years, indicating that the supply-demand elasticity remains constant.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Fudan University ranks 5th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, belonging to the top national universities. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is Fudan's flagship medical school, with clinical medicine rated as A-level, making its overall level extremely high. In 2025, Fudan's reputation was positive (e.g., A++ in journalism and communication research achievements), while in 2026, its reputation turned negative (incidents related to teacher ethics and conduct). Douyin comprehensive popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms, maintaining sustained high attention for applications. Clinical medicine A, public health and preventive medicine A+, pharmacy A, nursing A-, all at A- level or above. The enrollment major, clinical medicine (eight-year clinical physician class), corresponds to the A-level clinical medicine discipline, with national top-tier disciplinary strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine has maintained high popularity (2021-2024), and in 2026, it remains a highly recommended major. In 2026, the total number of ordinary college entrance exam takers in Ningxia is about 66,000, basically unchanged from 2025 (65,897), with about 44,550 physics category candidates, indicating a stable competitive landscape. Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has strong appeal to candidates from the northwest region. The enrollment plan in Ningxia is extremely small (only 1 student), typical of top universities from other provinces recruiting in Ningxia, with limited influence from regional preference factors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 128, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the basically stable total number of candidates, the sustained high popularity of clinical medicine, and the negative reputation of the school in 2026 but high Douyin heat, it is expected that the 2026 ranking will slightly move forward compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies). Main driving factors: the sustained high popularity of clinical medicine attracts more high-scoring candidates, but the negative reputation of the school in 2026 somewhat suppresses application enthusiasm; the unchanged enrollment plan does not alter the supply-demand elasticity. Predicted minimum ranking is about 118, with a range of 108-128.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Fudan University Shanghai Medical College only enrolls one major, Clinical Medicine (Eight-Year Clinical Physician Class), in the physics category in Ningxia, with an enrollment plan of only 1 student, representing a competition for extremely small quotas in a top medical major. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range (108-128) can attempt to apply; those with rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<108) have a higher probability of admission, while those close to the lower limit (>128) face higher risk. It is recommended to treat this university as a reach choice while preparing other 985 medical schools as safe options.
